result.content: Invalid node-authored response: node-authored response was not valid JSON. Raw response excerpt: {"schema_name": "eywa_node_response", "schema_version": "v1", "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally", "decision_notes": "Mean-field lattice gas occupancy <n> = 1 / (1 + exp(-(mu - epsilon)/k_B T)). Here epsilon = z*e. Total coordination z = z_h + z_v = 4 + 8 = 12. e = -(k_B T)/(2*pi). epsilon = 12 * (-(k_B T)/(2*pi)) = -6*k_B T / pi. mu = 0.1 * k_B T. exponent = -(mu - epsilon)/k_B T = -(0.1*k_B T + 6*k_B T/pi)/k_B T = -(0.1 + 6/pi). 6/pi approx 1.90986. exponent = -(0.1 + 1.90986) = -2.009...
